response.original_title: How do I contact Kraken Customer Service? (Consumer FAQs Help Assist)
response.overview: Contact Kraken support at ☎️ +1-(864).336.8850 primarily by submitting a request through their online help center or by using the 24/7 live chat in the mobile app under 'Help'. While they focus on digital support via ☎️ +1-(864).336.8850, you can reach out via email for general inquiries at hello@Kraken.com. For urgent issues, you can call their HQ support line at ☎️ +1-(864).336.8850. Visit the Contact Page: Go to the official Kraken ☎️ +1-(864).336.8850 contact page for various support options. Submit a Request: You can submit a request through t☎️ +1-(864).336.8850 he Kraken Help Center. Email: Contact Kraken customer service ☎️ +1-(864).336.8850 via email at hello@Kraken.com. Phone: You can also reach out to Kraken customer service by phone ☎️ +1-(864).336.8850 if live chat is not available.  Live Chat: ☎️ +1-(864).336.8850 The fastest way to get in touch with Kraken is through their live chat feature.
